context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Agent finish no longer has unbounded internal Refarm CLI steps: command-plan CLI steps now honor timeoutMs and surface spawn timeout/error messages, and agent finish passes the same 180s resource bound used by package process steps.
current_tasks: Commit 6ad1563d fix(cli): bound finish command steps.

Validation passed: pnpm -C packages/cli run test -- command-plan; pnpm -C apps/refarm exec vitest run test/commands/agent.test.ts --maxWorkers=1; pnpm -C packages/cli run type-check; pnpm -C apps/refarm run type-check; pnpm -C packages/cli run build; pnpm -C apps/refarm run build; refarm tidy imports --check --json; refarm check --next-action --json.

Real finish smoke with timeout 90s returned structured JSON instead of hanging. It failed at nested refarm check with spawnSync node EPERM in this sandbox while direct refarm check passed; treat nested spawn EPERM as next hardening target.
next_actions: Investigate nested spawnSync EPERM in refarm agent finish and prefer direct refarm binary/process handoff when running inside managed sandboxes.
Add progress/step-start output for non-JSON or optional NDJSON finish runs if silent waits remain painful.
Continue naming audit/split before publish: avoid Refarm-branded terms in SDK surfaces that should be provider/product neutral.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
